data.title: Restructure .claude-plugin/marketplace.json to two git-subdir entries (dso and dso-dev)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Convert .claude-plugin/marketplace.json from a single relative-path plugin entry to two git-subdir entries: dso (stable, pointing to main initially) and dso-dev (dev, pointing to main).

## Files to Modify
- .claude-plugin/marketplace.json

## New Structure
```json
{
    "name": "digital-service-orchestra",
    "owner": {
      "name": "Nava PBC"
    },
    "plugins": [
      {
        "name": "dso",
        "source": {
          "source": "git-subdir",
          "url": "navapbc/digital-service-orchestra",
          "path": "plugins/dso",
          "ref": "main"
        },
        "description": "Workflow infrastructure plugin for Claude Code projects (stable channel)"
      },
      {
        "name": "dso-dev",
        "source": {
          "source": "git-subdir",
          "url": "navapbc/digital-service-orchestra",
          "path": "plugins/dso",
          "ref": "main"
        },
        "description": "Workflow infrastructure plugin for Claude Code projects (dev channel — updates on every merge to main)"
      }
    ]
}
```

## Depends On
Task that updates test-marketplace-json.sh (RED tests must exist first)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] .claude-plugin/marketplace.json is valid JSON
  Verify: python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/marketplace.json > /dev/null
- [ ] marketplace.json has exactly 2 plugin entries
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json')); assert len(d['plugins'])==2"
- [ ] dso entry uses git-subdir source
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json')); p=[x for x in d['plugins'] if x['name']=='dso'][0]; assert p['source']['source']=='git-subdir'"
- [ ] dso-dev entry uses git-subdir source
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json')); p=[x for x in d['plugins'] if x['name']=='dso-dev'][0]; assert p['source']['source']=='git-subdir'"
- [ ] All test-marketplace-json.sh tests pass (RED→GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh
